data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding required vs optional request items.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of distinguishing between required and optional request items. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific credential request object or its linkage to the opening/task subject, indicating a gap in the requirement. The prior step evidence does not confirm the presence of the necessary request items, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of a credential request object linked to the source opening/task subject.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
